# Load the quranic_verses.json and inspect entries around matches.
import json, re, unicodedata, sys, math, os, itertools, difflib

qpath = '/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json'
hpath = '/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json'
with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)
len(qdata)

# Find ayat containing the snippet
snippet = "وَإِنْ خِفْتُمْ أَنْ تَجْرِبُوا أَزْوَاجَكُمْ فَزَوَّجُوا مَا أَحْبَبْتُمْ مِنْ أَزْوَاجِكُمْ أَوِ امْرَأَتَيْكُمْ أَوِ امْتَلِكُوا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمَاتِ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ"
matches = []
for item in qdata:
    text = item.get('ayah_text','')
    if snippet in text:
        matches.append(item)
len(matches)

# Let's implement normalization and similarity computations

import re
def normalize_arabic(text):
    # remove tashkeel (diacritics), tatweel, punctuation, unify hamza
    # Arabic diacritics range:
    tashkeel = '[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]'
    text = re.sub(tashkeel, '', text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640', '') # kashida
    # normalize alef hamza variants
    text = re.sub('[إأآا]', 'ا', text)
    # normalize taa marbuta to ه? No, common normalization often map ة to ه but we might keep as is.
    # unify hamza on waw and ya to basic forms
    text = re.sub('ؤ', 'و', text)
    text = re.sub('ئ', 'ي', text)
    # remove punctuations and diacritical marks like ۞ etc
    text = re.sub('[^\w\s\u0621-\u064A]', '', text)  # keep Arabic letters and digits and underscore? but \w may include english underscore.
    # But better to remove underscores;
    text = re.sub('_', '', text)
    # collapse spaces
    text = re.sub('\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

def char_lcs(a,b):
    # compute length of longest common subsequence (not substring) of two strings
    # Use dynamic programming
    la = len(a); lb = len(b)
    # Use DP with memory optimization maybe O(la*lb)
    dp = [[0]*(lb+1) for _ in range(la+1)]
    for i in range(la-1, -1, -1):
        for j in range(lb-1, -1, -1):
            if a[i]==b[j]:
                dp[i][j] = 1 + dp[i+1][j+1]
            else:
                dp[i][j] = max(dp[i+1][j], dp[i][j+1])
    return dp[0][0]

def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta); cb = Counter(tb)
    common = sum((ca & cb).values())
    if common==0: return 0.0
    prec = common / sum(ca.values())
    rec = common / sum(cb.values())
    f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1, prec, rec

user_span = "وَإِنْ خِفْتُمْ أَنْ تَجْرِبُوا أَزْوَاجَكُمْ فَزَوَّجُوا مَا أَحْبَبْتُمْ مِنْ أَزْوَاجِكُمْ أَوِ امْرَأَتَيْكُمْ أَوِ امْتَلِكُوا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمَاتِ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ"
# pick the candidate ayah 4:3 from qdata
cand = None
for item in qdata:
    if item.get('surah_id')==4 and item.get('ayah_id')==3:
        cand = item['ayah_text']
        break
cand, user_span[:80], normalize_arabic(cand), normalize_arabic(user_span)[:80]

a = normalize_arabic(cand)
b = normalize_arabic(user_span)
lcs_len = char_lcs(a,b)
len_a = len(a); len_b = len(b)
lcs_f1 = 2*lcs_len/(len_a+len_b) if (len_a+len_b)>0 else 0
tok_f1, prec, rec = token_f1(a,b)
lcs_len, len_a, len_b, lcs_f1, tok_f1, prec, rec

snippet = "وَإِنْ خِف...ُؤْمِنَاتِ"
# But the snippet uses ellipsis; better reconstruct snippet by removing ellipsis: maybe 'وَإِنْ خِف' and end tail '...ُؤْمِنَاتِ' 
# But developer said test both inputs: FULL substring and the user-provided snippet. We'll just use the given snippet.
a = normalize_arabic(cand)
b = normalize_arabic(snippet)
lcs_len = char_lcs(a,b)
len_a = len(a); len_b = len(b)
lcs_f1 = 2*lcs_len/(len_a+len_b) if (len_a+len_b)>0 else 0
tok_f1, prec, rec = token_f1(a,b)
lcs_len, len_a, len_b, lcs_f1, tok_f1, prec, rec

# prepare normalized tokens for each ayah and compute token f1 with user_span
user_norm = normalize_arabic(user_span)
best = []
from collections import Counter
for item in qdata:
    text = item.get('ayah_text','')
    tnorm = normalize_arabic(text)
    f1,prec,rec = token_f1(tnorm,user_norm)
    if f1>0:
        best.append((f1, prec, rec, item['surah_id'], item['ayah_id'], text))
best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: -x[0])[:20]
best_sorted[:20]

def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta); cb = Counter(tb)
    common = sum((ca & cb).values())
    if common==0: 
        return (0.0, 0.0, 0.0)
    prec = common / sum(ca.values())
    rec = common / sum(cb.values())
    f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return (f1, prec, rec)

best = []
for item in qdata:
    text = item.get('ayah_text','')
    tnorm = normalize_arabic(text)
    f1,prec,rec = token_f1(tnorm,user_norm)
    if f1>0:
        best.append((f1, prec, rec, item['surah_id'], item['ayah_id'], text))
best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: -x[0])[:30]
best_sorted[:30]

import difflib
a = normalize_arabic(cand)
b = normalize_arabic(user_span)
difflib_ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, a, b).ratio()
difflib_ratio
